## Core Research Conclusion
The best mean-F1 policy in this live-stack run was **Static** (mean_f1=0.6856, mean_accuracy=0.7480). Use this report together with the local experiment report to judge whether operational retraining cost is justified by predictive gains. The winning policy saw 4 concept-drift batches and a mean next-batch F1 recovery gain of 0.0000.
